scripts.test: yarn stop-test:android && yarn stop-test:ios && yarn start-test:android && yarn start-test:ios
scripts.stop-packager: ps aux | grep "$(pwd)" | grep launchPackager | awk '{print $2}' | xargs -r kill; true
scripts.stop-test:android: yarn stop-packager; EMULATOR_ID="$(adb devices | grep -v List | grep device | grep emulator | head -n 1 | cut -f 1)"; [ -n "$EMULATOR_ID" ] && adb -s "$EMULATOR_ID" shell am force-stop com.bitmovin.player.reactnative.integrationtest; true
scripts.stop-test:ios: yarn stop-packager; xcrun simctl list devices available -e -j | jq --raw-output '.devices.[].[] | select( .state == "Booted" and (.deviceTypeIdentifier | contains("iPhone"))).udid' | xargs -I UDID xcrun simctl terminate UDID com.bitmovin.player.reactnative.IntegrationTest 2> /dev/null; true
scripts.start-test:android: EMULATOR_ID=$(adb devices | grep -v List | grep device | grep emulator | head -n 1 | cut -f 1); if [ -z "$EMULATOR_ID" ]; then emulator -list-avds | head -n 1 | xargs -I NAME emulator -avd NAME 1> /dev/null 2> /dev/null & adb wait-for-device shell 'while [[ -z $(getprop sys.boot_completed) ]]; do sleep 1; done;' && EMULATOR_ID=$(adb devices | grep -v List | grep device | grep emulator | head -n 1 | cut -f 1); fi; ANDROID_SERIAL="$EMULATOR_ID" yarn cavy run-android --terminal bash --deviceId "$EMULATOR_ID"
scripts.start-test:ios: yarn cavy run-ios --terminal bash --simulator "$(xcrun simctl list devices available -e -j | jq --raw-output -s '[.[].devices.[].[] | select( .deviceTypeIdentifier | contains("iPhone") )|.name] | first')"
scripts.pods-update: [ "$(uname)" != Darwin ] || cd ios && NO_FLIPPER=1 pod update --silent
scripts.build:ios: xcodebuild -workspace ios/integration_test.xcworkspace -scheme integration_test -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -quiet | xcbeautify -qq --disable-logging
